Home > @imqueue/rpc > ICache > del

ICache.del() method

Removes the value stored in the cache under the given key.

Signature:

del(key: string): Promise<boolean>;

Parameters

Parameter

Type

Description

key

string

key to remove

Returns:

Promise<boolean>

{Promise}
